creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
Perhaps innocuous, but I want to double-check since configure complains:

 ===>  Configuring for p5-File-ChangeNotify-0.16
 Warning: prerequisite Module::Build 0.3601 not found. We have 0.340201.

This is with perl-5.10.  Do you perhaps need to pull in p5-Module-Build
from ports?

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
